en-US.title: 2020EV
en-US.subtitle: Shared EV charging for condos
en-US.description:
2020EV helps residents of participating buildings share a single EV charger without the group-chat chaos.

See the charger's live status, know who's plugged in, and claim your priority day. Every charging session is tracked automatically — energy used, duration, and your share of the electricity cost — and billed to your in-app wallet, which your building's administrator manages. A community feed keeps neighbors coordinated, and push notifications tell you when the charger frees up or a session is billed.

2020EV is invite-only: you'll need an invitation from your building's administrator to sign in. Each building's data is private to that building — residents only ever see their own community.

Features:
• Live charger status and current session
• Weekday priority scheduling
• Automatic session tracking and cost splitting
• Wallet balance and full charging history
• Community feed for your building
• Push notifications

Is your building sharing one charger over a group chat and a spreadsheet? Get in touch — 2020EV can run your charger too.
